actionItems.title: Calculate position size manually for next 3 trades
actionItems.description: Use formula: Risk $ ÷ (Entry - Stop) = Size. Verify reward:risk is at least 1:2.

actionItems.title: Answer pre-trade checklist before every trade
actionItems.description: What's my stop? What's my target? What's my position size? What's my risk %? Am I following my system?
